title: AI and MLOps
summary: AI roadmap, analytics maturity model and MLOps requirements.

blocks.heading: Analytics maturity model
bullets: L1 — Dashboards, KPIs, threshold rules (MVP target)
L2 — Statistical anomaly detection and baseline forecasting (MVP target)
L3 — Supervised models with labeled history (pilot extension)
L4 — Adaptive optimization, fleet intelligence, edge inference (future)

blocks.heading: AI module roadmap
bullets: Fuel Intelligence — forecast, anomaly, theft detection
Predictive Maintenance — RUL, failure prediction (requires labeled data)
Vision AI — undercarriage wear, component classification

blocks.heading: Training pipeline
bullets: Obtain minimum 6 months historical fuel and telemetry data
Engineer features aligned to canonical telemetry schema
Train models (Colab initially, then automated jobs)
Evaluate offline; register model weights with version metadata
Deploy shadow-mode; monitor drift and retrain on approval

blocks.heading: MLOps requirements
bullets: Experiment tracking and offline evaluation metrics
Online monitoring for drift and performance degradation
Confidence scores, explainability and minimum data thresholds
